ddls:
CREATE TABLE "agricultural_data" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entry in the data table */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of data entry */,
  "area" TEXT /* Geographical area where the data is collected */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the specific agricultural product */,
  "price1" REAL /* Initial price of the agricultural product */,
  "band" INTEGER /* Price band or category */,
  "demand" INTEGER /* Current demand for the product */,
  "excess_demand" INTEGER /* Excess demand indicating potential shortages */,
  "provisional_price" REAL /* Provisional price calculated based on market conditions */,
  "price_increment_applicable" REAL /* Indicates if a price increment is applicable */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude coordinates for geographical location */,
  "long" REAL /* Longitude coordinates for geographical location */,
  "price" REAL /* Current market price */,
  "market_conditions" TEXT /* Description of the current market conditions */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., manual entry, sensor, API) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agricultural_data_area FOREIGN KEY ("area") REFERENCES areas ("area_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "areas" (
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agricultural area */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the agricultural area */,
  "state" TEXT /* State to which the area belongs */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region classification for administrative purposes */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the area */,
  "climate" TEXT /* Climate conditions of the area */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_bands" (
  "band_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price band */,
  "band_name" TEXT /* Name of the price band */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the price band */,
  "min_price" REAL /* Minimum price for the band */,
  "max_price" REAL /* Maximum price for the band */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the band is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("band_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demand_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demand forecast entry */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the area for which the forecast is made */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the specific agricultural product */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date of the forecast */,
  "expected_demand" INTEGER /* Expected demand for the product on that date */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the forecast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demand_forecasts_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "excess_demand" (
  "excess_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each excess demand record */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the area experiencing excess demand */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the specific agricultural product */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when excess demand was recorded */,
  "excess_amount" INTEGER /* Amount of excess demand recorded */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the excess demand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("excess_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_excess_demand_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "provisional_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each provisional price record */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the area for which the provisional price is set */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the specific agricultural product */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the provisional price takes effect */,
  "adjusted_price" REAL /* New adjusted price based on market conditions */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the price adjustment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_provisional_prices_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price change record */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the area where the price change occurred */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the specific agricultural product */,
  "price_change_date" TEXT /* Date of the price change */,
  "old_price" REAL /* Previous price before the change */,
  "new_price" REAL /* Updated price after the change */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the price change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_history_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., farmer, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
